name: PolicyDecisionAuditEventV1
description: Versioned audit event schema for dual-writing policy decisions to off-chain logs and on-chain-compatible emitters.

notes.idempotencyKey: sha256(schema_version, decision_id, lifecycle_state, verdict, timestamp, input_digest)
notes.actorIds: Canonical actor identities participating in the decision lifecycle
notes.inputDigest: Stable digest of canonicalized decision inputs for off-chain/on-chain parity checks
